title: [MTR3/4] Avanti West Coast Class 390 'Pendolino'
description: Class 390 units in Avanti West Coast livery, for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![Smoothed Class 390 in Avanti West Coast Livery](https://i.imgur.com/m16PBFu.png)

# Avanti West Coast Class 390 'Pendolino' Pack
This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway, adding the Class 390 'Pendolino' to your in-game train fleet!

Ride in your MTR map with the amazing Class 390 'Pendolino' in the Avanti West Coast Livery, train originally made by the talented Transport Fever 2 mod maker cw_315,recolored by elliott.85 on steamworkshop and converted into MTR by Vitor2005, this train will make your High Speed trips shine.

Featuring: Class 390 in the regular Avanti West Coast Livery
